lookalikes.prompt: A female presenting individual, 30s to 40s, hiking on a forest trail with a daypack, wearing casual outdoor clothes. She has warm olive skin with subtle fine lines, scattered small freckles across cheeks and nose. Dark brown hair pulled back into a neat bun, revealing a clean hairline. Her face is a heart shape with a softly pointed chin and a strong, square jawline. Her eyes are striking amber, round, and set slightly closer together. Eyebrows are thick and straight. Her nose has a slightly upturned tip and a very subtle bump on the bridge. Lips are thin with a less defined cupid's bow. Her expression is a soft, closed-mouth smile, with a higher brow. Full-body shot, face turned toward camera. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
